objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=45)
- adx(period=20)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 35
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 35
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 15
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.75
tp_atr_mult: 3.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.75x) and take-profit (3.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Using a Bollinger band and ADX filter in conjunction with a Donchian channel breakout strategy can help identify more reliable trading opportunities by taking into account the trend strength and price volatility.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Bollinger bands, Donchian channels and ADX to identify potential breakout points. It is not using any other indicators for confirmation or divergence analysis which could provide additional insights into the market conditions. The use of only one timeframe also limits its ability to adapt to different market conditions. If results are poor (negative return), a more robust strategy that includes multiple timeframes, and uses other technical indicators like RSI, MACD etc., can be considered for backtest. In case of mediocre returns (low Sharpe ratio), adjusting stop-loss level or take profit levels based on ATR can improve the performance.

iterations.hypothesis: A combination of ATR based risk management and trend following indicators to filter trades in the right direction at the right time.
